cluster_missing_in_run3: canonical clusters [4] have no Jaccard>=0.30 match

clusters.competency_definition: The ability to understand the legal status, rights, and dynamics of different family structures including marriage, civil partnership, cohabitation, and parenting.

per_run_signatures.competency_name: Marriage, Civil Partnership, and Family Structures
Marriage, Civil Partnership, and Family Structures

clusters.competency_definition: The ability to understand and apply the principles of consent, trust, respect, and ethical behaviour that characterise healthy romantic relationships.
The ability to develop self-esteem, treat others with kindness and respect, and understand equality in relationships.
The ability to recognise different types of bullying, understand their impact, and respond appropriately as a victim or bystander.
The ability to end relationships or friendships with kindness while managing the difficult emotions that endings may bring.
The ability to understand how stereotypes, prejudice, and power imbalances can cause harm and affect behaviour in relationships.
The ability to critically analyse how pornography, media, and subcultures can negatively influence sexual attitudes and behaviours.

per_run_signatures.competency_name: Influences on Sexual Attitudes and Behaviours

clusters.competency_definition: The ability to protect personal information online, understand public versus private spaces, and recognise the nature of social media content.

clusters.competency_name: Managing Digital Content and Image Sharing
clusters.competency_definition: The ability to understand the risks and legal consequences of sharing images online and to respond appropriately when content is circulated.

per_run_signatures.competency_name: Managing Digital Content and Image Sharing

clusters.competency_name: Identifying Deepfakes and Harmful Online Content
clusters.competency_definition: The ability to recognise deepfakes, inappropriate online content, and understand where to seek support after exposure to harmful material.

per_run_signatures.competency_name: Identifying Deepfakes and Harmful Online Content

clusters.competency_definition: The ability to identify when technology is used for bullying, harassment, stalking, or coercive behaviour and to seek appropriate support.

clusters.competency_name: Online Scams and Emerging Technology Risks
clusters.competency_definition: The ability to recognise online scams, sextortion, and risks posed by emerging technologies including AI chatbots.

per_run_signatures.competency_name: Online Scams and Emerging Technology Risks
Online Scams, Data Privacy, and Emerging Technology Risks
Online Scams, Sextortion, and Data Privacy

clusters.competency_definition: The ability to recognise, communicate, and respect consent and boundaries in romantic and sexual relationships across all contexts.

per_run_signatures.competency_name: Consent and Boundaries in Intimate Relationships

clusters.competency_definition: The ability to judge when relationships or situations are unsafe, identify trustworthy sources, and employ strategies to increase personal safety.

per_run_signatures.competency_name: Recognising Unsafe Relationships and Personal Safety

clusters.competency_definition: The ability to understand what constitutes sexual harassment and violence, recognise concerning behaviours, and know that victims are never at fault.
The ability to understand the concepts and laws relating to domestic abuse, exploitation, grooming, and related harmful practices.

clusters.competency_name: Recognising Harmful Sexual Norms and Seeking Support
clusters.competency_definition: The ability to understand how pornography normalises harmful behaviours and to know how to seek support for worrying or abusive behaviour.

per_run_signatures.competency_name: Recognising Harmful Sexual Norms and Seeking Support

clusters.competency_definition: The ability to understand that sex can be positive when consensual and age-appropriate, and that ethical sexual behaviour requires more than consent alone.
The ability to understand contraceptive choices, access accurate reproductive health information, and know the options available regarding pregnancy.

per_run_signatures.competency_name: Contraception, Pregnancy Options, and Reproductive Health

clusters.competency_definition: The ability to understand how to reduce sexual health risks, the importance of testing, and where to access confidential support and treatment.

per_run_signatures.competency_name: Sexually Transmitted Infections and Sexual Health Services

clusters.competency_name: Emotional Wellbeing and Mental Health Literacy
clusters.competency_definition: The ability to understand and articulate emotions, distinguish normal feelings from mental health conditions, and recognise factors affecting wellbeing.

per_run_signatures.competency_name: Emotional Wellbeing and Mental Health Literacy
Emotional Wellbeing and Mental Health Literacy
Emotional Wellbeing and Mental Health Literacy

clusters.competency_definition: The ability to understand the relationships between gambling, alcohol, drugs, smoking, and mental health, including associated risks and harms.
The ability to understand how online behaviour affects mental and physical wellbeing and to critically evaluate online content and relationships.

per_run_signatures.competency_name: Digital Wellbeing and Online Harms to Mental Health

clusters.competency_definition: The ability to understand the links between diet and health risks including tooth decay, weight gain, and cardiovascular disease.

per_run_signatures.competency_name: Healthy Eating and Diet-Related Health Risks

clusters.competency_definition: The ability to understand the risks and legal aspects of illegal drugs, alcohol consumption, smoking, and vaping.
The ability to understand infection prevention, dental health, self-examination, vaccination, sleep hygiene, and reproductive health basics.

per_run_signatures.competency_name: Physical Health, Hygiene, and Preventive Care

clusters.competency_definition: The ability to understand how to access appropriate healthcare services and the legal frameworks around medical consent and capacity.
The ability to identify and manage personal safety risks in various contexts, including recognising and resisting peer pressure.
The ability to understand the realities of weapon carrying, recognise grooming and exploitation, and know how to seek help.
The ability to understand menstrual and reproductive health issues, know when to seek help, and understand basic first aid timing.
